Our Core Features

Everything You Need to Optimize Your Health

A complete ecosystem built around precision medicine, advanced diagnostics, and personalized health optimization.

Genetic Analysis

Decode your DNA to uncover specific genetic variants that influence your health span, cognitive aging, and athletic performance.

Advanced Lab Testing

Track 65+ critical biomarkers with comprehensive CLIA-certified diagnostics to gain unprecedented visibility into your biology.

Biological Age Tracking

Monitor the rate at which your cells are aging and see precisely how your lifestyle and clinical protocols reverse the clock over time.

Personalized Supplement Protocols

Receive tailor-made nutritional, nutraceutical, and lifestyle plans engineered specifically for your unique biological baseline.

Dedicated Health Coaches

Collaborate 1-on-1 with elite clinicians and coaches who actively interpret your data and accelerate your health goals.

Smart Member Dashboard

Centralize your health journey. Track daily progress, access clinical reports, manage appointments, and message your care team in one sleek interface.

How It Works

Your personalized health journey in four simple steps.

1

Book Consultation

Start by meeting with our clinical team to discuss your health history, longevity goals, and any specific areas of optimization.

2

Complete Lab Tests & DNA Analysis

We collect comprehensive biometric data through advanced blood panels, DNA methylation sequencing, and wearable integrations.

3

Receive Personalized Health Protocol

Our precision engine analyzes your unique biomarkers to create a bespoke protocol of nutraceuticals, peptides, and lifestyle changes.

4

Track Progress & Optimize Continuously

Your health isn't static. We continuously monitor your biometrics through our dashboard and adapt your protocol as your cellular age improves.

The VitalityX Advantage

Why Choose VitalityX

Healthcare built around you — not averages.

Personalized Care

Every protocol is custom-engineered based on your unique genetic makeup, biomarker levels, and lifestyle goals. We never use one-size-fits-all templates.

Evidence-Based Recommendations

Our interventions are strictly backed by peer-reviewed longevity science and clinical trials. No fads, just proven biological optimizations.

Expert Clinical Team

You're paired with elite longevity physicians and performance coaches who actively monitor your progress and refine your protocols.

Continuous Monitoring

Your health is dynamic. We use continuous biometric feedback loops to adjust your stack as your biological age improves.

Data Privacy & Security

Your genetic and clinical data is locked behind HIPAA-compliant, enterprise-grade encryption. Your health information is never sold.

Premium Member Experience

Enjoy a frictionless healthcare experience. From at-home testing to our elegant mobile dashboard, we've designed every touchpoint for your convenience.

Clinical Quality

We Measure What Matters

We translate raw biological inputs into plain-language clinical insights. By analyzing your cellular methylation markers and a comprehensive list of cardiovascular and metabolic indicators, our clinicians can pinpoint exact longevity optimizations.

  • GINA Sequenced: Complete genetic privacy under Federal Nondiscrimination protection.
  • ISO 27001 Data Control: Your records are isolated at the database layer, never sold.
  • Certified Laboratories: Assays processed in federally accredited pathology clinics.

Blood Biomarker Assay Preview

  • Apolipoprotein B (ApoB)

    Optimal
    Target: <80 mg/dL72 mg/dL

  • hs-CRP (Inflammation)

    Optimal
    Target: <1.0 mg/L0.8 mg/L

  • Homocysteine

    Elevated
    Target: <10.0 µmol/L14.2 µmol/L

  • Vitamin D (25-hydroxy)

    Borderline
    Target: 30-50 ng/mL31 ng/mL

  • HbA1c (Glycation)

    Borderline
    Target: 5.4-5.6%5.6%

Security & Governance

Clinical-Grade Security Architecture

We handle sensitive genomic and lab diagnostic records. Our platform is engineered to place data security and patient autonomy above all.

HIPAA Compliant

Your clinical biomarkers and health panel records are encrypted under federal Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act standards.

GINA Privacy Protection

Your DNA methylome sequencing data is shielded under the Genetic Information Nondiscrimination Act. It cannot be disclosed to employers or insurers.

Role-Based Access Control

Data boundaries are locked down at the database layer. A member only ever views their own metrics; staff access is strictly assigned and controlled.

Mandatory Two-Factor Auth

All clinical coaches, relationship leads, and administrators authenticate with a second factor. Idle sessions time out automatically to secure records.

Support & Knowledge

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before getting started.

How long does testing take?⌄

Initial home saliva swabs and local lab blood draws are processed within 7-10 business days. Once we receive the results, your personalized protocol is generated and reviewed by your clinical team within 48 hours.

How is my DNA protected?⌄

Your genetic data is shielded under the federal Genetic Information Nondiscrimination Act (GINA), encrypted at rest, and isolated at the database row level. It cannot be disclosed to insurers, employers, or marketing partners.

Can I cancel my membership?⌄

Yes — pause or cancel at any time from your member portal under Supplements or Settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing cycle.

What biomarkers are included?⌄

Standard membership includes 65+ markers spanning cardiovascular (ApoB, Lp(a), hs-CRP), metabolic (fasting insulin, HbA1c, OGTT), inflammatory, hormonal, micronutrient, and biological-age clocks. Executive tier extends to 85+ markers and quarterly multi-omics.

How are recommendations personalized?⌄

Our precision engine triangulates your DNA, biomarker trends, intake history, and (optionally) wearable data, then your assigned clinician reviews and signs off on every protocol change. Nothing is auto-shipped without human review.

Is there ongoing coaching?⌄

Yes. Complete and Executive members get 1-on-1 monthly consultations plus 24/7 messaging with their assigned care team between sessions.
